payload.name: pastikan gunakan skill ponytail untuk mencek unpush
payload.description:
pastikan gunakan skill ponytail untuk mencek unpush commit/changes, cek apakah request  
acl saya sudah fix, cek apakah request saya soal semua test passed? apakah 18 commit    
dari upstream yg kita merge benar2 sukses dan tidak merusak logic kita? jikapun         
conflit.ada yang mersuak, pikirkan untuk apakah lebih baik mengambil logic baru dari    
upstream atau tetap pertahankan kita (Selama masih linier degan custom logic kita),     
jika semua sudah terpenuhi, maka push ke main, kemudian lanjutkan                       
/media/DiskE/Code/9router-new/.kimchi/docs/ferment-handoff.md baca ini dan selesaikan   
semua masalah yang ada disini, gunakan sub agent sebanyaknya yang anda perlu untuk      
memaksimalkan hasil, tidak ada fake fix, mock fix, hanya fix standard prod dengan sub   
sub agent spesialis sesuai pov masing2 baik UX user, backend fe

goal.answer: Verify current fresh-clone state, fix ACL providers dialog, restore missing tests, audit the 18 already-merged upstream cherry-picks for custom-logic safety, harden integration tests to plug-n-play, push Phase 1 to main, then resolve every remaining item in ferment-handoff.md (GLM-5.2 reasoning leak, Ferment 5 deployment verification) and audit the upstream commits NOT yet merged into our tree with skip/adopt/hybrid decisions, committing Phase 2 without pushing.

payload.plain: Verify current fresh-clone state, fix ACL providers dialog, restore missing tests, audit the 18 already-merged upstream cherry-picks for custom-logic safety, harden integration tests to plug-n-play, push Phase 1 to main, then resolve every remaining item in ferment-handoff.md (GLM-5.2 reasoning leak, Ferment 5 deployment verification) and audit the upstream commits NOT yet merged into our tree with skip/adopt/hybrid decisions, committing Phase 2 without pushing.

criteria.answer:
pnpm run build exits 0 on Linux and the CI matrix workflow covers Windows/macOS.
pnpm test --pool=forks shows no new regressions beyond the documented 7-baseline failures; the mimo-free.live upstream anti-abuse failure is documented as external.
git status is clean with all Phase 1 changes committed before push.
The 18 already-merged upstream cherry-picked commits are audited with adopt/keep/hybrid decisions documented in .kimchi/docs/audit-upstream.md; no custom VansRoute logic is broken.
The ACL providers dialog lists noAuth/free providers (opencode, xiaomi-mimo, edge-tts, etc.) even when no DB connections exist; verified by runtime smoke.
Uncommitted/unpushed changes pass a ponytail-style audit; any dead/over-engineered code is removed or explicitly documented.
Integration tests are plug-n-play: the helper auto-starts the server, auto-seeds a test API key, and dynamically selects available models.
Phase 1 (items 1-6) is pushed to origin/main.
The GLM-5.2 reasoning leak (Ferment 4) is reproduced, fixed, and covered by tests/unit/glm-reasoning-leak.test.js.
The upstream commits NOT yet merged into our tree are audited and classified skip/adopt/hybrid in .kimchi/docs/audit-upstream.md (separate section), and adopt/hybrid commits are applied.
Ferment 5 deployment-repair criteria are re-verified: git fsck clean, build passes, tests pass, git status clean.
ferment-handoff.md is updated with the final state, resolved items, and any genuinely remaining work; committed as Phase 2 (no push).

pnpm test --pool=forks shows no new regressions beyond the documented 7-baseline failures; the mimo-free.live upstream anti-abuse failure is documented as external.

The GLM-5.2 reasoning leak (Ferment 4) is reproduced, fixed, and covered by tests/unit/glm-reasoning-leak.test.js.

ferment-handoff.md is updated with the final state, resolved items, and any genuinely remaining work; committed as Phase 2 (no push).

constraints.answer: Preserve all custom VansRoute logic: Kimi tool parser, NVIDIA NIM stream coercion, AgentRouter rules, resilience features (classify429, cooldown, daily quota, selected-connection header)., No emergency fallback on quota exhaustion except Kimchi next-month deactivation., No destructive git operations (--force/--hard reset) on main without explicit user approval., Do not hardcode secrets in repo files; test API key must be auto-seeded or env-driven., Use sub-agent/skill specialist passes (UX, backend, FE, QA) when possible; fall back to targeted manual exploration if harness sub-agent spawning is unavailable., Windows EPERM and bun:sqlite/node:sqlite UnhandledSchemeError fixes from prior build fixes must remain intact., Per-commit upstream conflict resolution must prefer custom VansRoute logic when it stays linear with upstream; adopt upstream only when it does not collide with custom features., No fake fixes or mock-only fixes: every fix must be prod-standard and verified by a real test or runtime check.

plain: Preserve all custom VansRoute logic: Kimi tool parser, NVIDIA NIM stream coercion, AgentRouter rules, resilience features (classify429, cooldown, daily quota, selected-connection header).
No emergency fallback on quota exhaustion except Kimchi next-month deactivation.
No destructive git operations (--force/--hard reset) on main without explicit user approval.
Do not hardcode secrets in repo files; test API key must be auto-seeded or env-driven.
Use sub-agent/skill specialist passes (UX, backend, FE, QA) when possible; fall back to targeted manual exploration if harness sub-agent spawning is unavailable.
Windows EPERM and bun:sqlite/node:sqlite UnhandledSchemeError fixes from prior build fixes must remain intact.
Per-commit upstream conflict resolution must prefer custom VansRoute logic when it stays linear with upstream; adopt upstream only when it does not collide with custom features.
No fake fixes or mock-only fixes: every fix must be prod-standard and verified by a real test or runtime check.

phases.answer: Ponytail audit of uncommitted changes, Verify ACL providers dialog includes free providers, Restore missing resilience tests and establish baseline, Audit 18 already-merged upstream cherry-pick commits, Harden integration tests to plug-n-play, Final build/test verification and Phase 1 push, Resolve remaining handoff + audit upstream not-yet-merged

phaseSnapshots.name: Ponytail audit of uncommitted changes
phaseSnapshots.goal: Audit current working-tree changes for over-engineering, dead code, and YAGNI violations using ponytail skill.
phaseSnapshots.description: Run a ponytail-style audit on the modified files. Remove or document dead code, temporary debug logs, and speculative abstractions. Ensure no fake fixes remain.

steps.description: Read ponytail skill and run audit over modified files.
Apply agreed minimal cleanups (dead deps, debug logs, unused imports).

phaseSnapshots.name: Verify ACL providers dialog includes free providers
phaseSnapshots.goal: Confirm the ACL API key edit dialog shows noAuth/free providers even when DB has no connections.
phaseSnapshots.description: The server endpoint /api/providers now returns a providers[] array; the dashboard EndpointPageClient merges registry providers into the ACL checkbox list. Verify backend returns them and frontend renders them.

steps.description: Runtime smoke: start server and GET /api/providers; assert providers[] includes noAuth providers.

verification.command: curl /api/providers returns providers array with opencode/xiaomi-mimo/edge-tts entries

steps.description: Dashboard smoke: open endpoint key dialog and verify free providers appear in the Providers list.

verification.command: providerList contains entries with count=0 and noAuth=true

phaseSnapshots.name: Restore missing resilience tests and establish baseline
phaseSnapshots.goal: Copy 5 missing test files from old repo and run full suite to confirm the 7 known baseline failures.
phaseSnapshots.description: The old repo has 5 unit test files missing in the fresh clone. Copy them, run pnpm test --pool=forks, and document any failures beyond the 7 pre-existing ones.

steps.description: Copy 5 missing test files from /media/DiskE/Code/9router/tests/unit/ to tests/unit/.
Run full test suite with --pool=forks and compare against baseline.

verification.command: pnpm test --pool=forks runs and reports 0 new regressions beyond documented 7

phaseSnapshots.name: Audit 18 already-merged upstream cherry-pick commits
phaseSnapshots.goal: For each of the 18 upstream commits already cherry-picked into HEAD, decide adopt/keep/hybrid and ensure custom logic is intact.
phaseSnapshots.description: Use git show and diffs against upstream to classify each commit. Document decisions in .kimchi/docs/audit-upstream.md (already-merged section). For conflicts, prefer custom VansRoute logic when it is linear with upstream.

steps.description: Produce audit-upstream.md with per-commit decision and rationale for the 18 already-merged commits.
Apply any hybrid fixes manually for already-merged commits and re-run build.

verification.command: pnpm run build exits 0 after merges

phaseSnapshots.name: Harden integration tests to plug-n-play
phaseSnapshots.goal: Make tests/unit/all-endpoints-robust.test.js auto-start the server, seed a test API key, and dynamically select available models so it passes on a fresh clone.
phaseSnapshots.description: Update tests/helpers/server.js to auto-seed a random API key. Update the test file to read the key from the helper and use getAvailableModel() for each kind. Ensure no hardcoded model IDs or secrets.

steps.description: Update helper to export TEST_API_KEY and seed it into SQLite.

verification.command: grep -q 'export const TEST_API_KEY' tests/helpers/server.js && grep -q 'seedTestApiKey' tests/helpers/server.js

steps.description: Update all-endpoints-robust test to import TEST_API_KEY and use dynamic models.
Run the integration test file.

phaseSnapshots.name: Final build/test verification and Phase 1 push
phaseSnapshots.goal: Run full build and test suite, commit all changes, and push Phase 1 to origin/main.
phaseSnapshots.description: After all fixes, ensure git status is clean, build passes, tests show no new regressions, then push.

steps.description: Final pnpm run build.
Final pnpm test --pool=forks.
Commit and push Phase 1 to origin/main.

verification.command: git push origin main succeeds and git log origin/main..HEAD is empty

phaseSnapshots.name: Resolve remaining handoff + audit upstream not-yet-merged
phaseSnapshots.goal: Understand and complete every remaining item in ferment-handoff.md, then audit upstream commits NOT yet merged into our tree with skip/adopt/hybrid decisions, applying adopt/hybrid, and commit Phase 2 without pushing.
phaseSnapshots.description: Read ferment-handoff.md fully and enumerate remaining work: Ferment 4 GLM-5.2 reasoning leak (reproduce, fix, test), Ferment 5 deployment-repair re-verification, and the 12 upstream commits not yet merged. For each not-yet-merged commit decide skip/adopt/hybrid in audit-upstream.md (not-yet-merged section), apply adopt/hybrid, then update handoff and commit Phase 2.

steps.description: Read ferment-handoff.md fully and produce a remaining-work checklist.
Reproduce GLM-5.2 reasoning leak via agentrouter (or captured SSE fixture) and implement the fix in agentrouter executor / Claude translator.
Write tests/unit/glm-reasoning-leak.test.js covering the fix.

verification.command: test -f tests/unit/glm-reasoning-leak.test.js && pnpm test tests/unit/glm-reasoning-leak.test.js passes

steps.description: Audit upstream commits not yet merged; document skip/adopt/hybrid per commit in audit-upstream.md not-yet-merged section.
Apply adopt/hybrid not-yet-merged commits (cherry-pick or manual merge); skip KEEP CUSTOM ones.

verification.command: pnpm run build exits 0 after applying

steps.description: Re-verify Ferment 5 deployment-repair criteria: git fsck clean, build, tests, git status clean.

verification.command: git fsck --full exits 0 && pnpm test --pool=forks no new regressions

steps.description: Update ferment-handoff.md with final state and genuinely remaining work; commit Phase 2 (no push).

verification.command: git diff --name-only shows .kimchi/docs/ferment-handoff.md && git status is clean

assumptions.answer: The old corrupted repo at /media/DiskE/Code/9router is still readable enough to copy the 5 missing test files.; The upstream remote is `upstream` pointing to https://github.com/decolua/9router.git and contains both the already-merged and not-yet-merged commits to audit.; The user approves pushing Phase 1 to origin/main once build + tests are green; Phase 2 remains commit-only.; mimo-free.live upstream 400 risk_control is an external upstream change and cannot be fixed from the VansRoute side without mocking the upstream.; AgentRouter credentials or a reproducible mock SSE capture exist to reproduce the GLM-5.2 reasoning leak; if live credentials are unavailable, the fix is validated with a captured raw SSE fixture.; The harness may not expose a sub-agent spawning tool; when unavailable, specialist POVs (UX/backend/FE/QA) are performed as sequential expert-mode passes using available skills (ponytail, understand, etc.).

payload.summary: Phase 1 (Ponytail audit of uncommitted changes) complete. Step 1 produced .kimchi/docs/ponytail-audit-report.md via targeted smell-greps over the origin/main..HEAD diff (67 files, +7906/-3676): no debug console.log/TODO/stub markers, no hand-rolled uuid/crypto, prior cleanup already removed express/http-proxy-middleware/selfsigned/fs/react-is/prop-types and replaced uuid with crypto.randomUUID(). New files (TokenSaverClient, kiroExternalIdp, import-cli-proxy, docker-compose) are real features, not YAGNI. Two verify-items flagged (not guaranteed cuts): v1beta models route ~913-line diff is mostly CRLF/whitespace; kiroExternalIdp.js wiring to confirm. Net: 0 lines / 0 deps cuttable — "Lean already. Ship." Step 2 confirmed no source edits were needed and ran pnpm run build → exit 0 ("✅ build complete").

grade.rationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

payload.summary: ACL providers dialog verified via two complementary smoke tests. Step 1 (runtime): started standalone server on PORT=3005 with REQUIRE_API_KEY=true, logged in via POST /api/auth/login (cookie auth, password 123456), GET /api/providers returned 97 providers with 8 noAuth=true entries (mimo-free, opencode, coqui, edge-tts, google-tts, local-device, searxng, tortoise) and zero DB connections. Step 2 (dashboard): orchestrator used Playwright to log in, navigate to /dashboard/endpoint, create a test API key (sk-e6288bca...), open its Edit Access dialog, uncheck the Providers "All allowed" checkbox, and confirm the expanded providerList rendered all 97 providers — including the 8 noAuth providers plus mmf and xiaomi-mimo, each showing "0 conn". Worker 01e4982b re-confirmed the API independently (97 providers, 8 noAuth=true). Honest reconciliation: the API's noAuth=true set (8) is a strict subset of the dialog's 10 free providers — mmf & xiaomi-mimo render as free via a pricing criterion rather than the noAuth boolean, but all noAuth providers are present with count=0, satisfying the verify intent. Servers + temp files cleaned up (PID-based kill, no pkill self-match).

grade.rationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.
